text:
Two steps, in order:
1. write the file /tmp/we-demo.ts with exactly this content: export function add(a: number, b: number) { return a + b; }
2. edit /tmp/we-demo.ts: replace "add" with "sum" (use the edit tool).
Then stop.

content.text: Done. File now contains `export function sum(a: number, b: number) { return a + b; }`.
